docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO SERVICE FILED BY DEFT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-27-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-02-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT CHALLENGES VENUE. VENUE IS PROPER. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
IN ITS EARLIER CHALLENGE TO VENUE REQUEST TO TRANSFER CASE TO FLORIDA. CASE CONTINUED FOR PLTF TO FILE ITS RESPONSE TO DEFT'S JURISDICTIONAL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-21-2005, OFF CALENDAR DUE TO NO SERVICE OF DEFT BY PLTF WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. PLTF TO RE-SET & SERVE DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 21ST CENTURY LAW GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AUSPITZ, RICHARD  ("DICKS DEALS") ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE COURT RECEIVED A LETTER FROM DEFT CHALLENGING SERVICE BY THE PLTF TO DEFT OUT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. PLTF ARGUED THAT DEFT WAIVED ITS CHALLENGE WHEN DEFT ARGUED THE FACTS OF THE CASE
CHALLENGE, WHICH WAS NOT SENT TO PLTF PRIOR TO 6/2/05 HEARING.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLFT FILED IN OPEN COURT.
CHALLENGE TO SERVICE FILED BY DEFT; REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL
